title: Skills CRUD — primitive-files.ts file writer + FilePrimitiveForm/SkillEditor; Skills panel New/Edit/Delete with owned-delete→Park guard

tests.summary: 6 passed — create SKILL.md + refuse clobber + edit + delete; command/rule path mapping; unsafe-name/traversal rejection + not-found on update; trailing-newline normalization; dispatch create→update→delete round-trip; and the OWNED-DELETE GUARD: file.delete on an APM-owned skill returns code 'owned' and leaves the file intact (route to Park)

typecheck.summary: 0 errors (primitive-files + quarters-detail file branch + quarters dispatch file actions + FilePrimitiveForm + SkillEditor registry entry)

build.summary: covered by the C1 build + re-verified at the global gate

e2e.summary: 2 passed — the new Skills test creates a unique skill (demo-skill-e2e, template prefilled from the typed name), edits the body, deletes it; seeded garrison-memory keeps its Promote action and is untouched

by: vision screenshots c2-skills-list.png + c2-skills-new-form.png vs the shell
designAudit.notes: New-skill button; row shows Edit + Promote + Remove (loose); New-skill drawer has a name field that live-prefills the SKILL.md frontmatter, an Edit/Preview markdown toggle, Cancel/Create footer; matches the shell; no emoji

video.note: Covered by the VERIFIED consolidated 'Manage everything from Quarters' walkthrough (11 beats, all vision-verified, run not flagged). This slice's own re-runnable committed e2e is the per-slice correctness gate.

notes: primitive-files.ts is Garrison's writer-of-record for loose skill/command/rule files (create/edit/delete). The writer-of-record invariant is enforced on BOTH sides: the UI hides Delete for an owned skill (shows Park), and the dispatch's guardedFileDelete refuses an owned delete server-side (code 'owned'). FilePrimitiveForm is the reusable name+markdown editor (Edit/Preview, explicit Save) that C3 reuses for commands/rules. C2 establishes the file detail provider (skill/command/rule content).
